{/* Hero */}

Pegasus Dreamscapes · Development

Where vision becomes physical value.

Pegasus Development is the execution arm of Pegasus Dreamscapes. We transform real estate opportunities through disciplined renovation, project planning, and value-add execution — from acquisition strategy to material decisions to project coordination.

{/* Approach */}

How We Approach Development

Strategy, scope, execution, follow-through.

Development is where most real estate companies lose discipline. The numbers look good on paper, the renovations drift, scope creeps, and the original thesis disappears.

Pegasus runs development the opposite way. We commit to a strategy on day one, document the scope, hold contingencies in reserve, and supervise the work with the same seriousness we'd apply if it were our only project.

{/* Phases */}

The Pegasus Development Process

Six phases, every project.

{services.map((s) => (

{s.title}

{s.body}

 ))}

Pegasus runs development the opposite way. We commit to a strategy on day one, document the scope, hold contingencies in reserve, and supervise the work with the same seriousness we'd apply if it were our only project.

The operating system behind disciplined real estate.

Pegasus Systems is the internal product organization inside Pegasus Dreamscapes. We build the tools that bring governance, intelligence, and operational control to real estate execution — for ourselves, and for the operators we work with closely.

Why Pegasus Systems Exists

Operations are the product.

Most real estate operations are duct-taped together — a spreadsheet here, a CRM there, a chat thread for the important parts, and tribal knowledge in someone's head.

Pegasus Systems exists because that approach doesn't scale and doesn't compound. We build the platform we need ourselves — and where appropriate, we open access to a small group of operators who care about the same things we do.

 ))}

# REAL ESTATE WEBSITE LAUNCH READINESS AUDIT ## CRITICAL ISSUES - LAUNCH BLOCKERS ### Missing SEO Metadata (3 public pages) **Severity: CRITICAL** - These pages have no SEO tags set, will rank poorly and lack proper Open Graph data - **contact.tsx** — Line 37: `export default function Contact()` — No `useSEO()` call. Page has zero SEO metadata. - **sell.tsx** — Line 55: `export default function Sell()` — No `useSEO()` call. Page has zero SEO metadata. - **submit-deal.tsx** — Line 25: `export default function SubmitDeal()` — No `useSEO()` call. Page has zero SEO metadata. **Required fix**: Add `useSEO()` hook with title and description to each function. --- ### Risky Financial Claims (Investment Disclaimer Missing) **Severity: CRITICAL** — Unqualified return projections without proper disclaimers - **partner.tsx, Line 432-433**: Shows `
8-12%
` followed by `

Typical annual returns

` - This is "typical annual returns" language WITHOUT adequate disclaimers that returns are not guaranteed - No statement that past performance is not indicative of future results - No risk warning that principal may be lost **Required fix**: Add prominent disclaimer: "These are projections only. Actual returns may vary. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Principal is not protected." --- ### Legal Jurisdiction Mismatch (Terms of Service) **Severity: HIGH** — Internal contradiction could invalidate dispute resolution - **terms.tsx, Line 130**: States disputes "shall take place in the state where our principal place of business is located" - **terms.tsx, Line 151**: States "These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Arizona" - **Issue**: Pegasus is based in East Bay, California, NOT Arizona. Arizona jurisdiction is incorrect. **Required fix**: Change line 151 from Arizona to California (or match the actual principal place of business). --- ### Geographic Inconsistency – "Bay Area" vs "East Bay" **Severity: MEDIUM** — Mixed messaging about service area - **about.tsx, Line 36 (SEO description)**: "a Bay Area real estate investment company" — Vague - **about.tsx, Line 132**: "Bay Area Based" (heading) - **about.tsx, Line 145**: "Deep Bay Area Knowledge" (subtext) - **about.tsx, Line 362**: "Connected with top real estate professionals across the Bay Area" - **footer.tsx, Line 90**: "Bay Area, California" (contact location) - **home.tsx**: Multiple references to "Bay Area" **Issue**: All About page references say "Bay Area," but should emphasize "East Bay" per company positioning (Oakland, Berkeley focus). Footer also says "Bay Area" when contact mentions are East Bay-centric elsewhere. **Compare to correct usage**: - **contact.tsx, Line 130**: "East Bay, California" ✓ (correct) - **about.tsx, Line 79 (in stats)**: "East Bay" ✓ (correct) - **about.tsx, Line 363**: "East Bay and Bay Area aligned network" (partially correct but redundant) --- ## CRITICAL QUALITY ISSUES ### Missing Top Padding on Primary Page **Severity: MEDIUM** — Navigation overlap issue on hero section - **home.tsx, Line 84**: `
` - **Missing `pt-20` or `pt-16`** — The fixed nav (height 16) will overlap the hero section - All other major pages have this: about.tsx (pt-20), contact.tsx (pt-20), sell.tsx (pt-20), development.tsx (pt-16), investments.tsx (pt-16), systems.tsx (pt-16), marketflow-beta.tsx (pt-16), privacy.tsx (pt-24), terms.tsx (pt-24) - Home is the flagship page and will display incorrectly on load **Required fix**: Change line 84 to: `
` --- ### Submit-Deal Page Authentication Condition Issue **Severity: MEDIUM** — Page structure allows unauthenticated users to see internal-only content - **submit-deal.tsx, Lines 40-44**: ```javascript if (user && isWholesaler) { return ; } return ; ``` - **Issue**: If a user is logged in but NOT a wholesaler, they see the public landing page (good), BUT if they're logged in as ANY other role, they might see confusing mixed messaging. Pegasus Dreamscapes Corp

Email: privacy@pegasusdreamscapes.com
